name: "Close Friends"
description:
A classic friends to lovers scenario. According to maggie, both of these boyos are "close friends". They say the closest friends are meant to be together. With you and Leroy, that's becoming a reality. Would you like to explore further or stay as friends? **There's no point in staying platonic anymore, is there?**
Art by [@Maggotnizer](https://twitter.com/Maggotnizer?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor) *(⭐)*
